name: Mark Watson
bio: Mark Watson is an English comedian and novelist from Bristol who studied at Cambridge, where he was a member of the Footlights. His hyperactive, self-deprecating storytelling earned a Perrier Best Newcomer nomination in 2005 and the inaugural Edinburgh Fringe Panel Prize in 2006. Known for marathon overnight shows, he is also a published novelist and panel-show regular.

timeline.ev: Wins the Daily Telegraph Open Mic Competition
Perrier Best Newcomer nomination for 50 Years Before Death
Wins the inaugural Edinburgh Fringe Panel Prize
Stand-up show Mark Watson Live filmed in Bristol
Amazon Prime special This Cant Be It released

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Newcomer nomination (2005)
